findings.message: Breaking schema change: the `Item.name` field is renamed to `title` (and `_to_item` now maps `row.name` into `title`) with no compatible path. Any existing GraphQL client selecting `name` will get a validation error since the field no longer exists in the schema.
findings.suggestion: Keep `name` available during a deprecation window instead of an in-place rename. Add `title` as a new field and retain `name` as a deprecated alias, e.g. `name: str = strawberry.field(deprecation_reason="use `title`")` resolving to the same value, then remove `name` only after clients have migrated.
